docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,532.50 FILED BY LUDDY, JOHANNA AS TO DEFENDANT YRACHETA, ALICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-06-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT AND INFORMED THE COURT THAT THEY SETTLED; JPT: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PER PRIOR HEARING ON 4/27, PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
